title: Soft-delete query scope function
prompt: Building on test_fixtures/soft_delete_missing_scope.ex, add a query-scope helper `active_query/0` that returns a query excluding rows where deleted_at is not nil. Also add a `soft_delete/1` function that takes a member and updates its deleted_at. Write to lib/my_app/accounts/member.ex.
tier_rationale: Two helper functions with Ecto.Query import + DateTime handling. Medium because queries must use is_nil, not deleted_at == nil.
research_citation: Dashbit — Soft deletes with Ecto and PostgreSQL.
